visualizations.title: Cross-Multiplication Principle
visualizations.description: The fundamental mathematical law that relates equal ratios.

steps.explanation: State that the two ratios are equal fractions (a proportion).
Multiply diagonally across the equal sign (extremes product = means product).

visualizations.title: Anatomy of Cross-Multiplication
visualizations.description: Watch how we cross-multiply 2/3 and 4/6 to prove they form a proportion.
